bridge-type.label: SmartThings Cloud Account
bridge-type.description: Connection to the SmartThings Cloud API via OAuth2 PKCE. Authorize at http(s)://[YOUR_OPENHAB]/smartthingscloud after adding this bridge.

parameter.name: clientId
parameter.label: Client ID
parameter.description: SmartThings OAuth2 client ID. Defaults to the open-source SmartThings CLI client ID (d18cf96e-c626-4433-bf51-ddbb10c5d1ed) — works for personal use without developer registration.

parameter.name: redirectUri
parameter.label: OAuth2 Redirect URI
parameter.description: Redirect URI sent to SmartThings during authorization. The default SmartThings client_id only allows localhost. Default: http://localhost:8080/smartthingscloud

parameter.name: clientSecret
parameter.label: Client Secret
parameter.description: OAuth2 client secret for your registered SmartThings app. Not needed for personal use with the default client ID.

parameter.name: accessToken
parameter.label: Access Token
parameter.description: Leave empty — tokens are managed automatically after OAuth2 authorization and stored internally. They will not appear here even when authorized.

parameter.name: refreshToken
parameter.label: Refresh Token
parameter.description: Leave empty — tokens are managed automatically after OAuth2 authorization and stored internally. They will not appear here even when authorized.

thing-type.label: SmartThings Washing Machine
thing-type.description: A Samsung washing machine connected via SmartThings Cloud. Provides real-time state, program info, energy monitoring and remote control.

parameter.name: deviceId
parameter.label: Device ID
parameter.description: SmartThings device UUID. Find it via GET https://api.smartthings.com/v1/devices using your access token, or from the SmartThings app device details.

parameter.name: pollingIntervalSeconds
parameter.label: Polling Interval (seconds)
parameter.description: How often to poll SmartThings API for washer status.

channel-type.label: Machine State
channel-type.description: Overall machine state: run, pause, stop

channel-type.label: Job State
channel-type.description: Current wash cycle phase: washing, rinsing, spin, finish, none, airWash, cooling, preWash, wrinklePrevent

channel-type.label: Completion Time
channel-type.description: Expected finish time for the current wash cycle

channel-type.label: Running
channel-type.description: ON when washer is actively running (jobState is not none/finish/stopped)

channel-type.label: Remaining
channel-type.description: Minutes remaining until the current cycle completes

channel-type.label: Power
channel-type.description: Turn the washing machine on or off

channel-type.label: Remote Control Enabled
channel-type.description: ON when the washer allows remote control from SmartThings

channel-type.label: Wash Program
channel-type.description: Active wash course/program (normal, heavy, delicates, permanentPress, etc.). Send the Samsung courseCode (e.g. 1B, 7F) to change program.

channel-type.label: Rinse Mode
channel-type.description: Rinse cycles setting (none, normal, extra, max)

channel-type.label: Spin Speed
channel-type.description: Centrifuge speed in RPM as string (e.g. 800, 1200, 1400). Send to change spin speed.

channel-type.label: Water Temperature
channel-type.description: Wash temperature in °C as string (e.g. 30, 40, 60, cold). Send to change temperature.

channel-type.label: Bubble Soak
channel-type.description: Enable or disable bubble soak pre-wash

channel-type.label: Buzzer Volume
channel-type.description: Buzzer volume level (0=mute, 1=low, 2=medium, 3=high)

channel-type.label: Extra Care Mode
channel-type.description: Clothing extra care operation mode (e.g. on, off, rotating)

channel-type.label: Extra Care Location
channel-type.description: Extra care user location (indoor, outdoor)

channel-type.label: Power Consumption
channel-type.description: Current power draw of the washing machine

channel-type.label: Energy Usage
channel-type.description: Accumulated energy consumption in kWh

channel-type.label: Water Consumption
channel-type.description: Cumulative water used in this session (liters)

channel-type.label: Child Lock
channel-type.description: ON when child lock is active (panel locked)

channel-type.label: Active Program Code
channel-type.description: Currently selected wash program code (e.g. B0, 1B, 65)

channel-type.label: Operating State
channel-type.description: Samsung operating state: ready, running, paused

channel-type.label: Progress
channel-type.description: Wash cycle progress in percent

channel-type.label: Detergent Remaining
channel-type.description: Remaining detergent amount

channel-type.label: Softener Remaining
channel-type.description: Remaining fabric softener amount

channel-type.label: Delay End (min)
channel-type.description: Remaining time until delayed start begins (minutes)

channel-type.label: Supported Courses
channel-type.description: Comma-separated list of available wash program codes

channel-type.label: Remaining Time
channel-type.description: Remaining cycle time formatted as HH:MM (e.g. "00:15")

channel-type.label: Total Cycle Time
channel-type.description: Total duration of the selected wash cycle (minutes)

channel-type.label: Firmware Update Available
channel-type.description: ON when a new firmware version is available for the appliance

thing-type.label: SmartThings Television
thing-type.description: A Samsung Smart TV connected via SmartThings Cloud.

parameter.name: deviceId
parameter.label: Device ID
parameter.description: SmartThings device UUID. Find it via GET https://api.smartthings.com/v1/devices.

parameter.name: pollingIntervalSeconds
parameter.label: Polling Interval (s)
parameter.description: How often to poll the SmartThings API for status updates.

channel-type.label: Volume
channel-type.description: TV audio volume level (0–100)

channel-type.label: Mute
channel-type.description: TV audio mute state — ON = muted

channel-type.label: Input Source
channel-type.description: Active input source (e.g. digitalTv, HDMI1, HDMI2)

channel-type.label: Supported Input Sources
channel-type.description: Available input sources as id=name pairs (e.g. dtv=TV, HDMI2=Nvidia Shield)

channel-type.label: TV Channel
channel-type.description: Current TV channel number — send a channel number string to change channel

channel-type.label: Channel Up
channel-type.description: Send ON to go to the next TV channel

channel-type.label: Channel Down
channel-type.description: Send ON to go to the previous TV channel

channel-type.label: TV Channel Name
channel-type.description: Current TV channel name

channel-type.label: Picture Mode
channel-type.description: TV picture mode (e.g. Standard, Movie, Dynamic)

channel-type.label: Supported Picture Modes
channel-type.description: Comma-separated list of available picture modes

channel-type.label: Sound Mode
channel-type.description: TV sound mode (e.g. Standard, Music, Movie)

channel-type.label: Supported Sound Modes
channel-type.description: Comma-separated list of available sound modes

channel-type.label: Playback Status
channel-type.description: Media playback status (playing, paused, stopped, etc.)

channel-type.label: Firmware Version
channel-type.description: TV firmware version string

channel-type.label: Online Status
channel-type.description: SmartThings device online status (online/offline)

thing-type.label: SmartThings Presence Sensor
thing-type.description: A SmartThings presence sensor or mobile phone showing home/away state.

parameter.name: deviceId
parameter.label: Device ID
parameter.description: SmartThings device UUID. Find it via GET https://api.smartthings.com/v1/devices.

parameter.name: pollingIntervalSeconds
parameter.label: Polling Interval (s)
parameter.description: How often to poll the SmartThings API for status updates.

channel-type.label: Authorization Status
channel-type.description: Shows whether the SmartThings account is authorized. Authorize at http(s)://[YOUR_OPENHAB]/smartthingscloud

channel-type.label: Presence
channel-type.description: ON = present (home), OFF = not present (away)

thing-type.label: SmartThings Light Sensor
thing-type.description: A SmartThings illuminance/light sensor reporting lux and brightness level.

parameter.name: deviceId
parameter.label: Device ID
parameter.description: SmartThings device UUID. Find it via GET https://api.smartthings.com/v1/devices.

parameter.name: pollingIntervalSeconds
parameter.label: Polling Interval (s)
parameter.description: How often to poll the SmartThings API for status updates.

channel-type.label: Illuminance
channel-type.description: Measured illuminance in lux

channel-type.label: Brightness Level
channel-type.description: Relative brightness intensity level (1–5)

thing-type.label: SmartThings Scene
thing-type.description: Executes a SmartThings scene. Send ON to the trigger channel to run the scene.

parameter.name: sceneId
parameter.label: Scene ID
parameter.description: SmartThings scene UUID. Find it via the SmartThings CLI: smartthings scenes

parameter.name: locationId
parameter.label: Location ID (optional)
parameter.description: SmartThings location UUID. Required only when the account has multiple locations.

channel-type.label: Trigger
channel-type.description: Send ON to execute the scene. Automatically resets to OFF after triggering.
